---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What situation are you running into that Orra doesn't handle well today?
Describe the problem before the proposed solution — we'd rather solve the
underlying issue than ship a specific API.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Orra to do? If you have a specific tool, directive,
or UX in mind, describe it.

## Alternatives

Other ways you've considered solving this, and why they don't quite fit.

## Additional context

Screenshots, transcripts, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
